zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Fleming於大約1530年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯斯分斯托時，他的父親Sir James Fleming29歲，母親Ismay Dillon22歲。他於1554年與Catherine Preston在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1597年11月9日在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯斯藍享年68歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯斯藍。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Fleming于大约1530年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯斯分斯托时，他的父亲Sir James Fleming29岁，母亲Ismay Dillon22岁。他于1554年与Catherine Preston在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1597年11月9日在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯斯藍享年68岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯斯藍。

nameMeanings.name: Fleming
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle English fleming. The word reflects a Norman French form of Old French flamanc ‘Fleming’, from the stem flam- + the ancient Germanic suffix -ing. In the Middle Ages there was considerable commercial intercourse between England and the Netherlands, particularly in the wool trade, and many Flemish weavers and dyers settled in England. This surname is also common in south and east Scotland and in Ireland, where it is sometimes found in the Gaelicized form Pléamonn.
German: variant of   Flemming  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Flemings
meanings: Americanized form of Flemish Vleminckx: patronymic from Vleminck, an ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle Dutch vleminc.

variants.name: Flanders
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

variants.name: Flemming
meanings: German: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle High German vlaeminc. People from Flanders spread throughout Germany, as well as England, in the Middle Ages as clothmakers and dyers.

variants.name: Flamenco
meanings: Spanish: ethnic name from flamenco ‘Fleming, Flemish person’ (see Fleming ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Fleming was born about 1530, in Stephenstown, County Meath, Ireland, his father, Sir James Fleming, was 29 and his mother, Ismay Dillon, was 22. He married Catherine Preston in 1554, in County Meath, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 9 November 1597, in Slane, County Meath, Ireland, at the age of 68, and was buried in Slane, County Meath, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Fleming est né environ 1530, à Stephenstown, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Sir James Fleming, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Ismay Dillon, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Preston en 1554, à County Meath, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 novembre 1597, à Slane, County Meath, Irlande, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Slane, County Meath, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Fleming um 1530 in Stephenstown, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir James Fleming 29 und seine Mutter Ismay Dillon 22. Er hat 1554 in County Meath, Irland Catherine Preston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. November 1597 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Slane, County Meath, Irland und wurde in Slane, County Meath, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Fleming è nato il circa 1530 nel Stephenstown, County Meath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Sir James Fleming, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Ismay Dillon, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Preston nel 1554, nel County Meath, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 9 novembre 1597, nel Slane, County Meath, Irlanda, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Slane, County Meath, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Flemingが約1530年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスステフエンストウンで生まれた時，父Sir James Flemingは29歳，母Ismay Dillonは22歳であった。1554年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスでCatherine Prestonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1597年11月9日にアイルランドコウントイ メアススランで68歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ メアススランにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Fleming(이)가 대략 1530년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 스테프스타운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James Fleming(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Ismay Dillon(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1554년 아일랜드 카운티 미스에서 Catherine Preston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1597년 11월 9일 아일랜드 카운티 미스 슬랜에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 미스 슬랜에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Fleming nasceu aproximadamente 1530, em Stephenstown, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir James Fleming, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Ismay Dillon, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Preston em 1554, em County Meath, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de novembro de 1597, em Slane, County Meath, Irlanda, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Slane, County Meath, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Fleming родился около 1530 г. в местности стифенстоун, коунти мит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Sir James Fleming было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Ismay Dillon, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Preston в 1554 г. в местности коунти мит, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 9 ноября 1597 г. в местности слан, коунти мит, Ирландия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности слан, коунти мит, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Fleming nació aproximadamente 1530, en Stephenstown, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Sir James Fleming, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Ismay Dillon, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Catherine Preston en 1554, en County Meath, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de noviembre de 1597, en Slane, County Meath, Irlanda, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Slane, County Meath, Irlanda.
